name: Andrew Arbo
contractor_status: B2B Contractor — immediate onboarding, no visa/payroll required
headline: AI Automation Engineer & Ex-Deloitte Consultant
summary: Former Risk & Process Advisory Consultant at Deloitte turned AI/Automation builder. I bridge the gap between deep technical engineering and business strategy. I build production SaaS platforms (Next.js, Supabase, n8n), automate entire business workflows with AI, and have a proven track record in data architecture, GRC compliance, and enterprise consulting.

experience.title: Founder & Full-Stack AI Engineer
bullets: Built a complete SaaS platform from scratch: 37 pages, 72 API routes, 32 DB tables, 114 unit tests
Tech: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Supabase (PostgreSQL), Tailwind CSS, Vercel
AI integration: Claude-powered multilingual chatbot (5 languages) and AI theory tutor with spaced repetition
17 automated n8n workflows: WhatsApp reminders, payment dunning, onboarding flows, Google review automation
Self-hosted infrastructure on Raspberry Pi 5: n8n, PostgreSQL, Redis, WhatsApp bridge, Uptime Kuma, WireGuard VPN
Stripe payment integration, digital contract e-signatures, DATEV/lexoffice accounting export
Multi-tenant architecture with Row Level Security, HMAC webhook signatures, DSGVO compliance

experience.title: Freelance Data Migration Architect
bullets: Architected end-to-end data governance frameworks for SaaS migrations with zero-downtime cutovers
Conducted IT Risk Assessments for data automation solutions, improving operational efficiency by 25%
Executed technical needs analyses aligning client infrastructure with regulatory requirements

experience.title: Senior Consultant – Technical Implementation & Systems Architecture
bullets: Translated complex technical security concepts and SOC2 compliance for non-technical executives, increasing stakeholder buy-in by 40%
Led translation of regulatory requirements (SOC2, ISO 27001) into automated technical specifications
Managed high-stakes international cross-functional data streams (EMEA/APAC) for risk mitigation

experience.title: Consultant – Process & Data Automation
bullets: Optimized client workflows with internal control frameworks, reducing data processing errors by 30%
Executed automated QA testing for financial and IT deliverables (ISO standards)
Developed GRC playbooks and automated system-handover docs, reducing onboarding time by 40%

experience.title: Business Systems Analyst
bullets: Built advanced Power BI dashboards for real-time IT KPI tracking with complex DAX queries
Optimized ETL reporting tools (VBA, SQL), reducing system downtime by 15%
Automated manual data validation, saving 20+ hours/week through script-based automation

cover_letter_style.tone: Confident, direct, slightly bold. Not corporate-boring. Lead with a hook that shows domain knowledge. Use bullet points for key selling points. End with logistics (location, contractor status). Keep it under 1 page.
cover_letter_style.example_hook: Most Customer Success applicants have to learn what 'Third-Party Risk Management' is after they get hired. I have lived it.
cover_letter_style.structure: 1) Bold opening hook, 2) Why I'm applying + Deloitte credibility, 3) 3 bullet points matching their requirements, 4) Logistics paragraph, 5) Short closing
